title: Agent Identity
description: Validates the identity file for a Sentinels agent. Every agent is a sentinel — a guardian with personality, purpose, and accountability. This schema ensures that identity is structured, inheritable, and brand-consistent.

agent_name.description: The canonical agent name — lowercase, hyphen/underscore separated.

role.description: What this agent does — its purpose in the Sentinels constellation.

archetype.description: The agent's personality archetype — the soul behind the role.

humor_frequency.description: How often this agent uses humor.

metaphor_usage.description: How often this agent uses metaphors.

philosophical_depth.description: How deep this agent goes into the why.

brand_voice_override.description: How this agent's voice deviates from the brand baseline. Only listed overrides differ; everything else inherits from brand defaults.

personality_traits.description: The human-readable personality traits that define this agent.

locked_properties.description: Brand properties this agent can NEVER override — the immutable DNA.

allowed_overrides.description: Properties this agent IS allowed to adjust within its role.

communication_constraints.description: The guardrails — what this agent can and cannot change about the brand voice.

knowledge_domains.description: What this agent knows about — the domains where it has authority.

extends.description: Path to the base agent template this identity extends.

default_language.description: The agent's preferred language for human communication.

catchphrases.description: Signature phrases or patterns this agent uses.

boundaries.description: Hard limits on what this agent will and will not do.
